title: Throwable Items
description: Adds useful effects to certain items when thrown hard enough
body:
# | DESCRIPTION | Adds a new throw attack, letting you throw certain items, especially "squishy" ones, for a small area effect, sound, and particle when they hit the ground. Some items have similar effects, such as fire charge and gunpowder both lighting TNT and doing damage but gunpowder lighting it faster (as if a TNT lit it instead of a flint and steel) and doing 1/2 heart more damage. These can be used in situations like manhunt/pvp (to slow or debuff an opponent who's right behind you or to light TNT quickly as a dangerous, fast attack), or just to escape from mobs. **The thrown items will need to have 1.5 blocks of air below them at any given point to trigger the effect. You can softly throw items to give them to friends, just be careful to be at the same height as them and looking slightly downward.**
![All 7 items with their effects below them](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d5897a3d394e3d2e6594d9d4c5402a6bf5a1738.png) # | VERSIONS | Currently supports Minecraft Java ```1.21-1.21.11```. # | COMPATIBILITY | Incompatible with packs that use the same function and tag names, may cause issues when transporting items or when a dropped item falls off an edge, as it mayfall hard enough to trigger the effect. Be careful how you throw the items. Also, non-solid blocks, **including water**, will also trigger it. ## | Patreon | Join my new Patreon to support my projects!
